stories.title: Start the countdown: 100 things to know before col...
stories.summary: From must-see games to Heisman Trophy contenders, we cover the top storylines ahead of the 2026 season.

stories.title: LeBron mulls Lakers-Thunder gap: 'Out-talented'
stories.summary: LeBron James says the Lakers were "out-talented" by the Thunder in the playoffs.

stories.title: Lions ink All-Pro LB Campbell to 4-year extension
stories.summary: The Lions have signed Jack Campbell to a four-year extension, putting him under contract with the franchise through the 2030 season.

stories.title: Mamdani's $50 WCup ticket lottery fuels NJ feud
stories.summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said Thursday that 1,000 tickets costing just $50 will be made available to residents of the city of more than 8 million for the World Cup.

stories.title: Top-10 sophomore Mercer to Cincy, will reclassify
stories.summary: Top-10 high school sophomore Kam Mercer has committed to Cincinnati, he told ESPN, while also planning to reclassify into the 2027 class.
